name: 2026-06-01 Constitutional Awareness Senate Aircon Wifi Cut TH
description:
The Senate session was called for 5 PM.

11 senators showed up. 13 were needed for quorum.

Then the aircon was cut.
Then the WiFi was cut.

The minority waited two hours before leaving.

A sitting senator had been arrested for plunder that morning. The majority's answer was to not show up, and to make the room hostile to the ones who did.

Article XI, Section 1. Public office is a public trust.

Tama na.

Senate plenary called 5pm 2026-06-01: majority bloc no-show after sitting senator arrested that morning on Sandiganbayan plunder warrant (flood-control scandal). 11 minority senators in chamber, quorum required 13. Aircon and WiFi cut while they waited; minority left at 7pm. Sources: Rappler, Inquirer, Manila Times, GMA.
